# For IDE Index

**Purpose:** Provide the generated inventory for `docs/external/for-ide/`; IDE embedding, LSP usage, and edit-time parser guidance live in [README.md](./README.md).

**Last updated:** 2026-04-22

> Generated by `python3 scripts/docs-index.py --write`. Edit `README.md` for scope and rules, then re-run the generator after docs-tree changes.

## Files

| Path | Entry | Summary |
|------|-------|---------|
| `BUILD.md` | [Styio IDE Build Guide](./BUILD.md) | Describe how to configure, build, and launch the IDE-facing targets styio_ide_core and styio_lspd, including the optional Tree-sitter syntax backend, after the repository-level toolchain is already in place. |
| `CXX-API.md` | [Styio IDE C++ API](./CXX-API.md) | Show how to embed Styio's IDE components directly from C++, from the high-level IdeService entrypoint down to the edit-time SyntaxParser. |
| `LSP.md` | [Styio LSP Usage](./LSP.md) | Define how IDE hosts should launch and talk to styio_lspd, and record the currently supported request and notification surface. |
| `TESTING.md` | [Styio IDE Testing](./TESTING.md) | Provide the repeatable verification commands for the IDE-facing build, syntax backend, LSP server, and documentation inventory. |
| `TREE-SITTER.md` | [Styio Tree-sitter Backend](./TREE-SITTER.md) | Explain how the repository-local Tree-sitter grammar plugs into styio_ide_core, and how to evolve it without breaking the IDE contracts. |
